title: n8n K8s: Install n8n with custom values
body:
helm install n8n community-charts/n8n \
  --namespace n8n \
  --set config.host={{your-domain.com}} \
  --set config.protocol=https \
  --set postgresql.enabled=true \
  --set redis.enabled=true \
  --set scaling.enabled=true
description: Install n8n with custom configuration - production-ready setup (community-charts.github.io/docs/charts/n8n/usage)
